extDescription.message: Monitor your Claude AI usage limits at a glance with an in-page sidebar widget.

errorTitle.message: Unable to retrieve usage. Make sure you are logged in to claude.ai.

noDataHint.message: Click ↗ to view usage on claude.ai

healthApiChanged.message: Claude Sidebar Monitor: the API format has changed. Extension needs updating.

healthApiUnreachable.message: Claude Sidebar Monitor: unable to reach the Claude API.

healthSidebarNotFound.message: Claude Sidebar Monitor: sidebar not found, widget cannot be displayed.

healthWidgetLost.message: Claude Sidebar Monitor: the widget has disappeared from the sidebar.

healthPopupApiChanged.message: The Claude API format has changed. The extension needs updating.

healthPopupApiUnreachable.message: Unable to reach the Claude API for several cycles.

healthPopupSidebarNotFound.message: The Claude sidebar was not found. The widget will not display.

healthPopupWidgetLost.message: The widget has disappeared and could not be re-injected.

freePlanPopup.message: Usage tracking is not available on the free plan. Upgrade to Pro or Max to see your session and weekly limits.

onboardingSubtitle.message: Never get caught off guard by usage limits again.

onboardingStep1c.message: appears in the Claude sidebar showing your usage at a glance. Visible only on claude.ai.

onboardingStep2c.message: (click the extension icon) gives you detailed limits and your plan info. Works from any website, anytime.

onboardingStep3c.message: to jump straight to the full usage page.

onboardingFooter.message: Everything stays on your device. No tracking, no external servers.
